g.text: Here we can use Kafka But for simplicity
we are not using it now
check cursor is in the query?
If its exists in redis then update
If its exists in redis count then update
1. I'm going to use express Gateway as api
2. I will apply ratelimiting in the api gateway
3. We will verify jwt using public keey in
4. And in the services we also will again verify
the jwt token for Hard security purpose
5. Im goging with microservices because users
will be 1M, so we have to need loadbalancers
6. In DB we will use async replication because
its read heavy application, and in a feed system

System Dedsign for simple Feed where everyone can view everyones post, and user login and registation (email verification is not required) and anyone can replay, like comment in a post. Target users 1M.
